memoryArtifacts.headline: Bouchard IV de Montmorency
memoryArtifacts.description:
Bouchard IV de Montmorency († 1130/1132) Seigneur de Montmorency, d'Écouen, de Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, d'Attichy et d'Hérouville. Fils d'Hervé de Montmorency et d'Agnès.

zh.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"是Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency和Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco的兒子，於1073年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希。他於1090年之前與Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1132年1月2日在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bouchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Michel, Normand, Pierre, Cecile, Gilles, Lucien, Alphonse, Jacques, Alain.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Burchard, composed of the elements burg ‘protection’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

French: in some cases, possibly also a nickname for someone with a big mouth (in either a literal or figurative sense), from bouche ‘mouth’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Buschor , Bushard , Bushaw , and Bushor .

variants.name: Bushard
meanings: Possibly, in some cases, also an Americanized form of German Buschard (see Bushart 2).

variants.name: Buschor
meanings: Swiss German: probably a Germanized form of French   Bouchard  . Compare   Buschur   and   Bushor  .

variants.name: Bushore
meanings: Americanized form of French Bouchard , reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. Compare Bushor .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" was born in 1073, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France as the son of Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency and Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco. He married Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" before 1090, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 January 1132, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" est né en 1073, à Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, fils de Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency et Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco. Il a épousé Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" avant 1090, à Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1132, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" wurde 1073 in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency und Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco geboren. Er hat vor 1090 in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Januar 1132 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" è nato il nel 1073 nel Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency e Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco. Lui sposato Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" prima del 1090, nel Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 gennaio 1132, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"は1073年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシでHervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de MontmorencyとAgned or Alvere - a de Mariscoの息子として生まれた。1090年以前にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシでAgnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1132年1月2日にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"(은)는 1073년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency(와)과 Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1090년 이전 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1132년 1월 2일 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" nasceu em 1073, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França filho de Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency e Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" antes 1090, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1132, em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" родился в 1073 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его родителей звали Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency и Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" перед 1090 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 января 1132 г. в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" nació en 1073, en Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia como hijo de Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency y Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco. Se casó con Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" antes de 1090, en Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de enero de 1132, en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 59 años.
